text: FBI files: Ghislaine Maxwell living in Boston MA (Aug 2019), reverse proffer with SDNY set for September.

location: Little St. James Island, U.S. Virgin Islands
text: Co-conspirator ordered to shred Epstein's massage appointment phonebooks at USVI home before search warrant.
Sen. Sasse letter: Epstein found injured, semi-conscious in MCC cell ~3 weeks before his Aug 10, 2019 death.
Three separate emails corroborate Daria/Darla flew with Epstein to Little St. James Island, April 19, 2018.
FBI flew to Sweden to interview the primary Epstein victim's mother — too ill to travel to the US.
